name: Chocolate Mint Sugar Cookie Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 1 10-ounce bag of Nestles Mint-Chocolate Chips in this recipe.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine 1 cup sugar and vegetable oil; mix well.
4. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
5. Gradually beat in the flour mixture.
6. Stir in Mint-Chocolate chips.
7. Shape into balls using rounded teaspoonfuls of dough.
8. Roll each ball in remaining 1/4 cup of sugar.
9. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
10. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 8 to 10 minutes.
11. Cool completely on wire racks.
